info.title: RugSense
info.description: Rug/honeypot risk + scored intelligence for freshly-launched Base tokens. Each token gets one machine-actionable AVOID/WATCH/HOT decision with a 0-100 composite, a calibrated safetyConfidence, and transparent per-signal checks[] — deterministic, no LLM. Signals: honeypot + buy/sell tax (trade simulation), mintable/blacklist/pausable + ownership, owner-mutable trade-control latent-honeypot, holder concentration, sniper/bundle supply, funding-source wallet clusters, transaction-graph centrality, serial-deployer reputation, a repeat-offender wallet denylist built from rugs we've caught, and LP burn/lock + duration (Uniswap v2 + v3). Each call is paid per-request over x402 v2 (USDC on Base) — no API keys, no signup. An unpaid request returns HTTP 402 with an x402 v2 payment challenge (PAYMENT-REQUIRED header); pay and retry. See docs/INTEGRATE.md.

get.description: Returns freshly-launched Base tokens, each scored for safety + momentum into an AVOID/WATCH/HOT decision, sorted by composite. Discoverable on x402 Bazaar / Agentic.Market.
The 'is THIS token safe?' check. Returns the full scored assessment for a given Base token address. Settles only on success — an invalid address (400) or a token with no pool (404) is not charged.

404.description: No DEX pair found for this token on Base

get.summary: Batch-score up to 20 Base tokens in one call
get.description: Pre-screen a watchlist: score many Base tokens at once, each with its AVOID/WATCH/HOT decision + composite + per-signal checks. Feed-grade scoring (cheaper per-token than individual /api/token calls; for the Etherscan-deep deployer/cluster verify on a single token use /api/token/{address}). Flat $0.10/call for up to 20 tokens. Charged only if at least one address resolves to a Base pool.

400.description: No valid address in the request

404.description: None of the addresses resolved to a Base pool

PaymentRequired.description: x402 v2 payment challenge. The PaymentRequired payload is in the base64 PAYMENT-REQUIRED response header (scheme exact, network eip155:8453, USDC, $0.03). Pay with an x402 client and retry.

composite.description: 0-100, safety-gated — the number to gate on

safetyConfidence.description: 0-100; share of safety checks with a definitive result

safetyPartial.description: true → key checks could not run; treat with caution

safety.description: Raw safety facts: honeypot, buyTax, sellTax, verified, proxy, mintable, ownershipRenounced, top10Pct, whaleCount, lpSecuredPct, lpLockType, lpUnlocksInDays, sniperPct, firstBlockBuyers, fundingClusterSize, deployer, deployerDeployments, deployerAgeDays, deployerPriorTokens, deployerPriorRugged
